name: com.moonforge.core
description: Deterministic modular RPG engine for Unity. Includes combat, quests, dialogue, economy, exploration, inventory, crafting, shops, equipment, stats, and persistence systems driven by a command/query + reactor pipeline. Gameplay logic is pure C# with no UnityEngine dependencies, so the same engine runs in Unity, console apps, and servers with bit-for-bit deterministic results from a seeded RNG.

samples.description: Class-based roguelike with town hub, procedural dungeons, turn-based battles, contracts, gear, and meta-progression. Mirrors the samples/Moonforge.Sample.Roguelike.Console reference 1:1 — same RoguelikeSession headless logic, Unity TMP HUD instead of Spectre.Console.
